title: Why you'll love this course
description: Our UI/UX & Product Design program delivers industry-leading results through a simplified, hands-on learning approach.

cards.title: 20+ Hours Recorded Sessions
cards.desc: In-depth, structured lessons you can watch at your own pace — revisit concepts anytime without rushing or missing details.

cards.title: Gen AI–Integrated Curriculum
cards.desc: Learn how to use AI as a design assistant — for research, ideation, and more — without replacing design thinking.

cards.title: Career & Portfolio Preparation
cards.desc: Build work that reads like real product experience — with guidance on case studies, storytelling, and presentation.

cards.title: 1 - 1 Review Support
cards.desc: Get direct feedback on your designs so you know what's working, what's not, and how to improve faster.

cards.title: Live Sessions With Industry Professionals
cards.desc: Get real insights from designers, developers, and hiring managers about building products and growing your career.

cards.title: Practical UX Design Exercises
cards.desc: Apply every concept through hands-on exercises that simulate real-world design problems — not hypothetical tasks.
